skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Show missing enchantments in the tooltip of an item.
Show missing enchantments in the tooltip of an item.
Show enchantments that are not at their maximum level in the tooltip of an item.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.pre: Prevents Skyblock swords (e.g. Spirit Sceptre) from being placed as blocks while still allowing their abilities to activate.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.hid: Hides cheap coin ground drops (coin/coins player-head drops).
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.set: Set Kat reminder for pet upgrades
Automatically create a reminder when Kat starts upgrading your pet so you get notified when it's ready to pick up.
Automatically create a reminder when Kat starts upgrading your pet.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Only show missing enchantments when pressing Shift

Only show missing enchantments when pressing Shift.
Setting this to false makes missing enchantments always visible.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ent:
Enter to confirm input sign 
(press Shift + Enter for new line)

Press Enter to finish sign editing on Hypixel input signs (AH and BZ). 
Shift plus Enter always makes a new line like vanilla.
Press Enter to finish sign editing. Shift plus Enter still adds a new line.
Apply Enter confirm to all signs
Ignores the Hypixel input sign check and applies Enter to confirm on every sign editor. Shift plus Enter always makes a new line.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable item glow outline
Shows a glow outline on item drops near you.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Shows the glow outline even if the item is behind a block.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.def: Default color for the item glow outline. Use hex format like #RRGGBB.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Reminder Sound
Play a sound when a reminder is triggered.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rem:
Choose which sound to play for reminders.
Click to cycle through available sounds.

Adjust the volume of reminder sounds.
Range: 0.0 (silent) to 2.0 (very loud)

Adjust the pitch of reminder sounds.
Range: 0.5 (low) to 2.0 (high)
Default: 1.0 (normal)
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ext: Increases the maximum number of chat messages kept in history beyond the default 100.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.cha:
Maximum number of chat messages stored in history.
Range: 100–2048. Default: 1024.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.com: Removes duplicate chat messages and shows a counter like (×3) instead.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.onl:
When enabled, only compacts messages that appear consecutively.
When disabled, compacts all duplicates regardless of position.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.com:
Only compact duplicate messages that arrive within this many minutes of the first occurrence.
Set to 0 to disable (compact all duplicates regardless of age).
Ignored when 'Only Compact Consecutive' is enabled.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.cen:
Properly centers space-padded text from Hypixel at any chat width.
Only active while on Hypixel.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.smo:
Replaces dash-based separator lines (e.g. -----SkyBlock-----) with smooth centered lines.
Only active while on Hypixel.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Chat Tabs

Adds channel tabs (All, Party, Guild, PM, Co-op) above the chat input.
Only active while on Hypixel.
Enable Chat Context Menu
Right-clicking a chat message shows a context menu with options to copy or delete it.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rig: When enabled, right-clicking a chat message immediately copies its plain text to the clipboard instead of opening the context menu.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Chat Search (Ctrl+F)

Press Ctrl+F in chat to open a search bar that filters messages.
Type multiple words to require all of them (AND matching).
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.alw:
Always show the search bar in chat, without needing to press Ctrl+F.
The bar stays visible the entire time the chat screen is open.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Chat Animation
Adds a smooth slide-up animation when new messages arrive and when the chat input opens.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.cha:
How long the chat animation takes in milliseconds.
Range: 50–500. Default: 150.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Show Price Tooltips
Shows AH Lowest BIN and Bazaar prices in item tooltips while on SkyBlock.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.pri:
How often price data is refreshed from the API.
Range: 1–30 minutes. Default: 5.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Tooltip Scroll
Scroll long tooltips with the mouse wheel. Works with both vanilla and Modern UI tooltips.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.anc: When the tooltip don't fit on screen start it at the top instead of the bottom.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.too: How fast the tooltip moves per scroll wheel notch.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.inv: Inverts the vertical scroll direction for tooltips.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Horizontal Scroll
Hold Left Shift and scroll to move tooltips horizontally.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.noD: Prevents sneak from toggling twice due to pose update packets.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.dis: Disables the resource pack compatibility warning.
Disables the command confirmation dialog that appears when executing certain commands.
Disables the command confirmation dialog that appears when executing certain commands.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.hid: Hides the item frame when it contains an item, leaving only the item visible.
Hide texture error messages in logs
Hide texture error messages produced when Mojang fails to verify skin textures
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Fullbright
Makes the world fully bright regardless of light level.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ful: Forces fullbright to use the gamma override instead of the custom shader. The mod will automatically fall back to this when Iris shaders are active.
How bright fullbright makes the world. Higher = brighter.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Recipe Viewer Integration

Enables integration with Reliable Recipe Viewer (RRV) to show SkyBlock recipes.
Requires RRV to be installed.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rep:
How often the NEU repo data is automatically refreshed.
Range: 1–168 hours. Default: 24.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Enable Recipe Diagnostics

Logs a detailed breakdown of all recipe types found in the NEU repo on startup.
Useful for development, not needed for normal use.
Enable Ground Item Debug Helper
Logs detailed info for ground item entities.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.gro: If enabled, only logs items within the configured radius.
Radius around the player to scan when nearby-only mode is enabled.
How often ground item debug logs are emitted.
